changes.title: Rotate payments-api TLS certificate
changes.description: Replace the expiring wildcard certificate on the payments-api ingress before the 2026-07-20 expiry.

changes.title: Enable connection pooling on ledger-db
changes.description: Turn on PgBouncer transaction pooling for the ledger-core database.

changes.title: Retire legacy checkout redirect
changes.description: Remove the deprecated checkout-web redirect shim after the migration completed.

changes.title: Raise payments-api rate limit to 5000 rps
changes.description: Increase the payments-api gateway rate limit ahead of the quarterly launch.
